title: INR18650-LG-3500-MJ1 Cathode GITT Overpotential Extraction
author: Kuhn, Yannick
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Scope 
 This record contains workflows that extracts the cell overpotential from GITT measurements during discharging and charging. 
 Files 
 
 
 
 Filename 
 Description 
 Format 
 Usage 
 
 
 
 
  18650-LG-3500-MJ1-Cathode_GITT_ch_without_EIS_2327_overpotential_extraction.flow  
 Workflow for extracting overpotential data from GITT charge tests without EIS (ID: 2327). 
 Flow file ( application/x-flow+json ) 
 Automates the extraction of overpotential data for charge processes. 
 
 
  18650-LG-3500-MJ1-Cathode_GITT_dch_without_EIS_2321_overpotential_extraction.flow  
 Workflow for extracting overpotential data from GITT discharge tests without EIS (ID: 2321). 
 Flow file ( application/x-flow+json ) 
 Automates the extraction of overpotential data for discharge processes. 
 
 
 
 Related Resources 
 
 
 
 Relationship 
 Record 
 Description 
 
 
 
 
  isPartOf  
  INR18650-LG-3500-MJ1 Cathode Characterization Data  
 All data obtained on the harvested cathode of the MJ1 cylindrical 18650 cell from LG CHEM 
 
 
  Continues  
  INR18650-LG-3500-MJ1 Cathode GITT Structured Data  
 This record contains GITT measurements during discharge and charge, pre-selected and packaged in parquet files for further analysis. The measurement is obtained in three-electrode configuration with the working electrode NMC, counter electrode composite graphite/silicon oxide, and reference electrode lithium metal in a coin cell casing. The data is intended to support the characterization of the open-circuit potential (OCP) and lithium diffusion proprties of the NMC active material. 
 
 
  Continues  
  INR18650-LG-3500-MJ1 Cathode GITT OCV Model Fit  
 This record contains an open-circuit voltage (OCV) model fitted to OCV curves from GITT measurements during discharging and charging. The GITT measurements were obtained from positive electrode (cathode) harvested from an INR18650-MJ1 Li-ion battery cell manufactured by LG CHEM. The active material in the electrode is NMC. The measurment is obtained in three-electrode configuration with the working electrode NMC, counter electrode composite graphite/silicon oxide, and reference electrode lithium metal in a coin cell casing. 
 
 
  IsContinuedBy  
  INR18650-LG-3500-MJ1 Cathode GITT Overpotential  
 This record contains overpotential observed in GITT measurements during discharge and charge, pre-selected and packaged in parquet files for further analysis.The GITT measurements were obtained from positive electrode (cathode) harvested from an INR18650-MJ1 Li-ion battery cell manufactured by LG CHEM. The active material in the electrode is NMC. The measurment is obtained in three-electrode configuration with the working electrode NMC, counter electrode composite graphite/silicon oxide, and reference electrode lithium metal in a coin cell casing. 
 
 
 
 Licensing 
 This dataset is licensed under CC-BY 4.0, allowing for sharing and adaptation with proper attribution. 
 Contact Information 
 For questions or further assistance, please contact Dennis Kopljar at dennis.kopljar@dlr.de. 
 References 
 This dataset is linked to the following publication: [DOI/Link to publication].
